gates.name: protocol conformance
gates.detail: random: 100/100 self-games, 0 protocol errors / timeouts / illegal moves.

gates.name: warm-up isolation
gates.detail: NPS flat across moves 1-20; no move-1 cold-start spike.

gates.name: language tax (miniature)
gates.detail: cpp-alphabeta score share: 96% fixed-node -> 100% wall-clock. Speed ratio 4.4x (1,391,479 vs 316,644 nps).

markets.label: cpp-alphabeta wins the Fixed-Node match
markets.desc: Resolves YES if cpp-alphabeta scores more than py-mcts at equal node budget.

markets.label: cpp-alphabeta wins the Wall-Clock match
markets.desc: Resolves YES if cpp-alphabeta scores more than py-mcts at equal wall-clock.

markets.label: py-mcts wins at least one Wall-Clock game
markets.desc: Can the knowledge pole steal a point when starved of nodes by the language tax?

markets.label: The language tax is real: C++ dominates MORE under wall-clock
markets.desc: Resolves YES if cpp-alphabeta's score share is higher under wall-clock than under fixed nodes — i.e. Python loses Elo purely to speed.
